5 New Project Support to KHAS within the Scope of TUBITAK ARDEB 1001 Program

TÜBİTAK ARDEB 1001 program 2023 2nd term

According to the results, 5 of our research projects were eligible for support.

While the support rate for projects submitted in the second semester of 2023 was

18.3%

across Turkey, this rate was

27.7%

at our university.

We congratulate our executive and research academics whose projects have been supported and wish them continued success.

Supported project information is provided in the table below:

Project Manager

Faculty / Department to which the Executive is affiliated

Project Name

Researcher / Consultant

FENS / Industrial Engineering

Determination of the Energy-Momentum Tensor in General Relativity with Integrability Conditions

Assoc. Prof.. Dr. Burak Doğruyol

Faculty of Economics and Administrative Sciences / Psychology

Is Intuitive Cooperation Possible Under Threats of Earthquake, Terrorism, and Famine?

Prof. Dr. Adil Sarıbay (Researcher), Assoc. Prof. Dr. Onurcan Yılmaz (Consultant)

Faculty of Economics and Administrative Sciences / Psychology

Examining Causal Language, Causal Reasoning, Counterfactual Language, and Counterfactual Thinking from a Developmental Perspective: A Study of Mental Space

Dr. Lecturer Member Ayhan Ensici

Experience-Oriented Public Service Design: Developing Urban Experience Mapping and Service Design Methods for Municipalities

Faculty of Economics and Administrative Sciences / Economy

Development of Long-Term and Regional Crop Yield Forecast Models in Turkey Between 1930-2020
